source_pr.title: Telemetry: Add slow query statistic bucket into telemetry data
source_pr.body:
<!-- Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?

Issue Number: close #25005<!-- REMOVE this line if no issue to close -->

Problem Summary:

### What is changed and how it works?
Add slow query statistic bucket into telemetry data
Proposal: [xxx](url) <!-- REMOVE this line if not applicable -->

What's Changed:

How it Works:
Work with telemetry framework.
### Related changes

- PR to update `pingcap/docs`/`pingcap/docs-cn`:
- Need to cherry-pick to the release branch

### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- Manual test (add detailed scripts or steps below)
1. Setup TiDB
2. Create a query which process time is over 300 ms, suggest join.
3. Use: admin show telemetry check whether the slow query buckets displayed.

Side effects

- Performance regression
    - Consumes more CPU
    - Consumes more MEM
- Breaking backward compatibility

### Release note <!-- bugfixes or new feature need a release note -->
- Add slow query statistic buckets into telemetry data.

root_cause_explanation: Telemetry slow-query stats used global bucket maps that could be read/written concurrently, leading to data races. The fix adds a lock to protect shared state and also increases Prometheus query timeout to reduce timing-related flakes under load.
fix_pattern: Protect shared slow-query bucket state with a lock (mutex/RWMutex) and increase Prometheus query timeout (e.g., 1s → 30s) to handle CI/load variability.

evidence: files: docs/design/2021-04-21-unify-log-library.md, docs/design/2021-04-26-lock-view.md, docs/design/imgs/pd-log-dependency.png, docs/design/imgs/tidb-log-dependency.png, executor/executor_test.go, executor/show_test.go, executor/stale_txn_test.go, sessionctx/variable/sysvar.go, sessionctx/variable/sysvar_test.go, sessionctx/variable/varsutil.go, telemetry/data.go, telemetry/data_feature_usage.go, telemetry/data_slow_query.go, telemetry/telemetry.go

Triage summary: Fix race condition.
Changed files (4): telemetry/data.go, telemetry/data_feature_usage.go, telemetry/data_slow_query.go, telemetry/telemetry.go
Patch series analyzed; see patch_url.
